Build-Depends: debhelper-compat (= 13), pci.ids (>= 0.0~2019.11.10-2) <!noudeb>, pkgconf, libkmod-dev [linux-any], libudev-dev (>= 196) [linux-any], zlib1g-dev
Description: PCI Utilities The PCI Utilities are a collection of programs for inspecting and manipulating configuration of PCI devices, all based on a common portable library (libpci), which offers access to the PCI configuration space on a variety of operating systems.
Package-List: libpci-dev deb libdevel optional arch=any libpci3 deb libs optional arch=any libpci3-udeb udeb debian-installer optional arch=any profile=!noudeb profile:v1=!noudeb pciutils deb admin standard arch=any pciutils-udeb udeb debian-installer optional arch=any profile=!noudeb profile:v1=!noudeb
